title: Magpie's Shiny Client
description: A vanilla server-compatible modpack with optimisation, QoL, and immersion.
body:
A vanilla server-compatible modpack with optimisation, QoL, and immersion. For further performance on low end computers, disable the physics mod, tweak the shader settings or turn them off with K. 

This modpack is what I use when playing on vanilla servers, with some preset options, that I feel is good enough to share. However, you aren't playing on my computer, so you may want to double check the Minecraft settings or reset the shaderpack settings and tweak them yourself. Resourceify is added to make installing shaders and resourcepacks easy, in case there's stuff you want or you just want to browse.

> ℹ️ **In some versions some things were a bit annoying, like a skin collection mod that kept my settings and set your skin to whatever it was at the time I made it, or tutorial popups still appearing, these have been removed in newer versions, apologies if anyone was affected.**

For a complete list of mods, check the Versions tab. The major features are:

## Optimisation

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Embeddium
  - Greatly improved performance.
- Makeup UltraFast Shaders
  - Beautiful lighting and effects at no noticeable cost.

</details>



## QoL

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Chat Patches
  - An improved chat!
- Just Enough Items (and extras)
  - Information on all blocks and items in the game, right in your inventory.
- Mod Detection Preventer
  - Not sure if it'll stop you from being banned, but hey, just in case.
- Mouse Wheelie
  - Use shift to transfer a stack instantly, middle mouse to sort, and more!
- No Telemetry
  - Stop M$ from spying on you!
- Xaero's Minimap + Map
  - Never get lost!

</details>



## Immersion

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Dynamic Surroundings
  - Beautiful ambient sounds and other features.
- First-person Model
  - See yourself!
- Physics Mod
  - Satisfying ragdolls and other effects.
- Restored Female Gender Mod
  - An edit of Wildfire's Gender Mod to restore original size and physics. Yes,  this is very important for my immersion. Press G to configure.
- Sounds
  - Adds satisfying UI sounds and more!
- Sound Physics Remastered
  - Beautiful effects and processing on sounds, muffling and reverb based on the block around you, etc.

</details>

Mods will vary based on Minecraft version.

> **⚠️ The gender mod was made for 1.20.2 and it unfortunately crashes when clicking Appearance settings. To configure size, seperation, rotation, height and depth, you'll need to edit the JSON file in `/config/WildfireGender` after starting the game, or copy and paste it from another instance where it worked. Sorry about that!**


## License
Do anything you want with this modpack, except for putting it behind a paywall or building on it without crediting me somewhere. This doesn't override the licenses of the individual mods in this pack.
